description: model-fallback skill output: next model tier to try, or null when at the opus ceiling

oneOf.description: The next model tier to use; only present when at_ceiling is false
null when at_ceiling is true — no further fallback is possible

at_ceiling.description: true when current_model is opus or error_kind is non-escalatable (permission_denied, schema_not_found, max_turns_exhausted_at_ceiling)
